evals.name: react-app-interaction
evals.prompt: Can you spin up the React website in this repo and play around with it? Save screenshots of each interaction state to the images/ folder.
evals.expected_output: A sequence of 4+ numbered PNG screenshots in images/ showing distinct states: initial render, after counter clicks, popup open, popup closed. Plus a Node script driving the interactions.

evals.name: vite-fresh-scaffold
evals.prompt: Scaffold a fresh Vite + React project (use the react template), start its dev server, click around the default landing page, and save screenshots of each interaction state to images/.
evals.expected_output: A working Vite+React project, plus 3+ numbered PNG screenshots showing distinct interaction states (e.g., initial, after counter click, etc.).

evals.name: modernize-broken-puppeteer
evals.expected_output: A rewritten Node script using modern Puppeteer APIs (no waitForTimeout), plus a sequence of numbered PNG screenshots of distinct interaction states.
